title: Opening for Production Engineer at Emami

jsonLd.title: Opening for Production Engineer at Emami
jsonLd.description:
Emami has an exciting opening for a Production Engineer at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Emami:
Emami is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Emami!
